understanding.goal_understanding: Place every selectable piece onto goal tiles marked '+' so that all goals are occupied simultaneously to trigger WIN and progress through all levels within the per-level step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each MOVE action attempts to shift the currently selected piece by one grid cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction, but movement can be stopped by walls/boundaries or altered by special interactions; some adjacent objects are pushable and will be pushed if directly in the movement direction and space permits. Levels can contain multiple selectable pieces; CLICK switches control to the selectable located at the exact pixel coordinates provided (matching the positions listed in state). The movement_blocked flags only indicate an adjacent object is present and do not guarantee the move will fail.

history.summary: Turn 1: MOVE_RIGHT | We appear enclosed by walls; try moving right to test if any wall is passable/one-way.
history.reasoning: We appear enclosed by walls; try moving right to test if any wall is passable/one-way.

history.summary: Turn 2: CLICK | We’re boxed in by walls on all four sides; try switching to the other selectable to see if it has an exit or can interact differently.
history.reasoning: We’re boxed in by walls on all four sides; try switching to the other selectable to see if it has an exit or can interact differently.

history.summary: Turn 3: CLICK | This selectable is boxed in by walls on all sides, so switch back to the other piece to attempt reaching the goal area.
history.reasoning: This selectable is boxed in by walls on all sides, so switch back to the other piece to attempt reaching the goal area.

history.summary: Turn 4: MOVE_RIGHT | We appear enclosed by walls, but movement hints are heuristic—probe for any passable boundary by trying to move right first.
history.reasoning: We appear enclosed by walls, but movement hints are heuristic—probe for any passable boundary by trying to move right first.

history.summary: Turn 5: MOVE_RIGHT | Try moving right into the adjacent selectable/wall to see if pushing/switching behavior allows progress toward the goal area.
history.reasoning: Try moving right into the adjacent selectable/wall to see if pushing/switching behavior allows progress toward the goal area.

history.summary: Turn 6: CLICK | We’re boxed in by walls on all four sides, so try switching to the other selectable to see if it has mobility toward the goal area.
history.reasoning: We’re boxed in by walls on all four sides, so try switching to the other selectable to see if it has mobility toward the goal area.

history.summary: Turn 7: MOVE_UP | We’re adjacent to the goal area; try moving up into it since the up target includes a goal and may still allow overlap despite the wall hint.
history.reasoning: We’re adjacent to the goal area; try moving up into it since the up target includes a goal and may still allow overlap despite the wall hint.

history.summary: Turn 8: MOVE_RIGHT | Try moving onto the goal area to satisfy one of the required goal occupations.
history.reasoning: Try moving onto the goal area to satisfy one of the required goal occupations.
